InstructionData.Title: Frn_AdvFurnace Controller
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
#Advanced Furnace Control Script 0.1 INIT: alias d_afurnace d0 #Furnace actual alias d_maxtemp d1 #Dial 1 alias d_maxpress d2 #Dial 2 alias d_emervent d3 #Emergency Vent Lever alias d_disp2 d4 #LED Display 2 alias d_disp3 d5 #LED Display 3
alias r_maxtemp r1 alias r_maxpress r2 alias r_frntemp r3 alias r_frnpress r4 alias r_tmp r5 alias r_emervent r11 #Emergency vent
#configure furnace s d_afurnace On 1 s d_afurnace SettingInput 0 s d_afurnace SettingOutput 0
#configure LED Displays s d_disp2 Color 3 s d_disp3 Color 0 s d_disp2 Setting 99999 s d_disp3 Setting 99999
START: l r_emervent d_emervent Setting #load lever pos breqz r_emervent 2 #branch 2 if a=0 j EMERGVENT #goto emergency vent l r_frnpress d_afurnace Pressure l r_frntemp d_afurnace Temperature s d_disp2 Setting r_frnpress s d_disp3 Setting r_frntemp
CHECKPRESS: l r_maxpress d_maxpress Setting mul r_maxpress r_maxpress 100 brgt r_frnpress r_maxpress 3 # br if overpressure s d_afurnace SettingOutput 0 # not at max pressure j CHECKTEMP # move on s d_afurnace SettingOutput 50 # at maximum pressure j START # go back and check again
CHECKTEMP: l r_maxtemp d_maxtemp Setting mul r_maxtemp r_maxtemp 100 brgt r_frntemp r_maxtemp 4 # br if overtemp s d_afurnace SettingInput 25 # not at max temp s d_afurnace Activate 1 s d_afurnace Activate 0 s d_afurnace SettingInput 0 # close charge valve again s d_afurnace Open 0 j START
EMERGVENT: s d_afurnace On 1 s d_afurnace SettingInput 0 s d_afurnace SettingOutput 100 sleep 1 l r_emervent d_emervent Setting #load the lever pos breqz r_emervent 2 #branch 2 if a=0 j EMERGVENT j START
EOF:
